recommendation.title: LEAPS Call — Bet on High-End Analyst Target
recommendation.entryNote: Stock at all-time high ($331.97) with consensus target barely above current price ($335.59 avg, +2%). High analyst target is $370 (+12%). Use LEAPS to benefit from continued AI infrastructure demand without overpaying for short-term premium. Q1 beat was strong: EPS $1.17 vs. $1.01 est (+16%); guidance raised to $13.75B revenue (+34% YoY) and EPS $6.35 (+51%).

companyOverview: Leading provider of power management, thermal management, and IT infrastructure for AI data centers. Q1 2026: revenue $2.65B (+30%), EPS $1.17 (+83% YoY), FCF $653M (+147%). Raised FY2026 guidance to $13.75B revenue and $6.35 EPS. Acquired Strategic Thermal Labs (April 27) for advanced liquid cooling. $15B+ order backlog. Americas revenue +53% driven by hyperscaler AI capex.
catalysts: AI infrastructure demand driving data center power/cooling requirements
Liquid cooling becoming mandatory as AI racks reach 120–150kW density
Q1 EPS beat of 16% with FY guidance raised — execution is strong
Strategic Thermal Labs acquisition adding advanced liquid cooling IP
Americas revenue +53% driven by hyperscaler expansion
risks: Stock at all-time high — consensus target barely above current price (+2%)
Competition from Eaton, Schneider Electric, nVent in power/thermal management
Risk hyperscalers internalize cooling solutions (reducing third-party demand)
Customer concentration with a few large hyperscalers
Integration risk from Strategic Thermal Labs acquisition
Premium valuation: limited margin of safety if AI capex cycle slows
dilution: Standard large-cap dilution from stock-based compensation. No concerning dilution events. Acquisition of Strategic Thermal Labs was cash-funded.
